title: Structs, Methods, Method Sets, Embedding, and Composition · Go Semantics Case: Method Receivers
summary: A job scheduler needs explicit domain records, validated transitions, method behavior, and composition without accidental promotion. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go method receivers increment in a validated job-domain model. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
